source_pr.title: domain: avoid check schema changed when change is tiflash replica status
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Some DDL change no need to add to `schemaChecker`.
Such as:
* ActionUpdateTiFlashReplicaStatus
* ActionSetTiFlashReplica

Maybe below DDL type also no need to add to `schemaChecker`:
* ActionCreateSchema
* ActionCreateTable
* ActionShardRowID
* ActionModifyTableComment
* ActionCreateView
* ActionRecoverTable
* ActionRepairTable

### What is changed and how it works?


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - 

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - Possible performance regression

Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

Release note

 - Write release note for bug-fix or new feature.

symptoms: Transaction commit can be affected by TiFlash replica status DDL diffs being treated as schema changes (schema checker should skip those DDL types).
failure_signature: Schema checker incorrectly treats TiFlash replica status DDL diffs as schema changes, causing `domain.ErrInfoSchemaChanged`-like failures during transaction commit.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR changes schema-diff handling to skip schema checker checks for TiFlash replica status updates and adds coverage. Without a concrete flaky failure signature or CI evidence that this was an intermittent test failure, keep it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
analysis:
PR title: domain: avoid check schema changed when change is tiflash replica status
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/13034
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: c.Skip("skip race test")
Changed files (2): ddl/db_test.go, domain/domain.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/13034.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=ddl/db_test.go name=TestSkipSchemaChecker
